summary: Completed testing of password-based authentication features. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with Login/SignUp tabs, password fields, forgot password flow, and OTP verification steps all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Password hashing uses SHA256 with static salt - consider using bcrypt or argon2 for production
OTP is logged to console when SendGrid is not configured - this is expected for development/testing

test_credentials.otp_testing: OTP is logged to backend console when SendGrid is not configured

context_for_next_testing_agent: Password-based auth fully tested. Signup flow: name+email → OTP verification → set password. Login flow: email+password. Forgot password flow: email → OTP → new password. All OTPs logged to backend console. UI has Login/SignUp tabs in modal.

login_modal_tabs.details: Login modal has Login and Sign Up tabs that switch between forms

send_otp_for_signup.details: POST /api/auth/send-otp sends OTP for signup, returns is_new_user flag

signup_with_password.details: POST /api/auth/signup creates account with OTP verification and password

reset_password.details: POST /api/auth/reset-password resets password with OTP verification

forgot_password_link.details: Forgot password? link on login form navigates to forgot password step

password_validation.details: Password must be at least 6 characters - validated on both frontend and backend

confirm_password_matching.details: Confirm password field present on signup and reset password forms

mocked_apis.email_otp: OTP is logged to backend console (SendGrid not configured)
mocked_apis.note: Email delivery is MOCKED - OTP codes appear in backend logs with format: [OTP] Email: xxx, Code: xxxxxx
